title: eragrostis barrelieri var. pygmaea
intro: Eragrostis barrelieri var. pygmaea, also known as the pygmy love grass or dwarf love grass, is a small species of grass native to Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis barrelieri var. pygmaea include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
